authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Nimbus Dam to USGS gauging station cable crossing
reaches.toDesc: U.S. Geological Survey gauging station cable crossing about 300 yards downstream from the Nimbus Hatchery fish rack site

reaches.name: USGS gauging station to SMUD power line crossing at Ancil Hoffman Park
reaches.fromDesc: U.S. Geological Survey gauging station cable crossing about 300 yards downstream from the Nimbus Hatchery fish rack site
reaches.toDesc: SMUD power line crossing at the southwest boundary of Ancil Hoffman Park

reaches.name: Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD power line crossing to Jibboom Street bridge
reaches.fromDesc: SMUD power line crossing at the southwest boundary of Ancil Hoffman Park

reaches.name: Jibboom Street bridge to the mouth
reaches.toDesc: mouth (confluence with the Sacramento River at Discovery Park)

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(4) — American River (Sacramento Co.)
sources.quotedText: (4) American River (Sacramento Co.). (A) From Nimbus Dam to the U.S. Geological Survey gauging station cable crossing about 300 yards downstream from the Nimbus Hatchery fish rack site. Closed to all fishing all year. (B) From the U.S. Geological Survey gauging station cable crossing about 300 yards downstream from the Nimbus Hatchery fish rack site to the SMUD power line crossing at the southwest boundary of Ancil Hoffman Park. Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. Only barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Jul. 16 through Oct. 31. Only barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon. (C) From the SMUD power line crossing at the southwest boundary of Ancil Hoffman Park downstream to the Jibboom Street bridge. Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Jul. 16 through Dec. 31. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon. (D) From the Jibboom Street bridge to the mouth. Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Jul. 16 through Dec. 16. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon. Dec. 17 through Dec. 31. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40 — Hatchery Trout/Steelhead Footnote (**) Definition
sources.quotedText: Hatchery trout or steelhead in anadromous waters are those showing a healed adipose fin clip (adipose fin is absent). Unless otherwise provided, all other trout and steelhead must be immediately released.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

groups.humanSummary: American River from Nimbus Dam to the USGS gauging station cable crossing ~300 yards downstream of the Nimbus Hatchery fish rack site (Sacramento Co.): closed to all fishing all year, protecting the hatchery broodstock collection area immediately below the dam.
groups.verbatimText: (A) From Nimbus Dam to the U.S. Geological Survey gauging station cable crossing about 300 yards downstream from the Nimbus Hatchery fish rack site. Closed to all fishing all year.

groups.humanSummary: American River from the USGS gauging station cable crossing to the SMUD power line crossing at the southwest boundary of Ancil Hoffman Park: open Jan. 1–Jul. 15 and Jul. 16–Oct. 31, barbless hooks only, 2 hatchery trout/steelhead daily (4 in possession), closed to take/possession of Chinook salmon.
groups.verbatimText: (B) From the U.S. Geological Survey gauging station cable crossing about 300 yards downstream from the Nimbus Hatchery fish rack site to the SMUD power line crossing at the southwest boundary of Ancil Hoffman Park. Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. Only barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Jul. 16 through Oct. 31. Only barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

groups.humanSummary: American River from the Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD power line crossing downstream to the Jibboom Street bridge: open Jan. 1–Jul. 15 and Jul. 16–Dec. 31, 2 hatchery trout/steelhead daily (4 in possession), closed to take/possession of Chinook salmon.
groups.verbatimText: (C) From the SMUD power line crossing at the southwest boundary of Ancil Hoffman Park downstream to the Jibboom Street bridge. Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Jul. 16 through Dec. 31. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

groups.humanSummary: American River from the Jibboom Street bridge to the mouth: open Jan. 1–Jul. 15, Jul. 16–Dec. 16, and Dec. 17–Dec. 31, 2 hatchery trout/steelhead daily (4 in possession); closed to take/possession of Chinook salmon during Jul. 16–Dec. 16 only.
groups.verbatimText: (D) From the Jibboom Street bridge to the mouth. Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Jul. 16 through Dec. 16. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon. Dec. 17 through Dec. 31. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Reach immediately below Nimbus Dam used for hatchery broodstock collection; closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year from Nimbus Dam to the USGS gauging station cable crossing.
regulations.verbatimText: From Nimbus Dam to the U.S. Geological Survey gauging station cable crossing about 300 yards downstream from the Nimbus Hatchery fish rack site. Closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Open January 1 through July 15 and July 16 through October 31, USGS gauging station to Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD crossing.
regulations.verbatimText: Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. ... Jul. 16 through Oct. 31.

parameters.note: Only barbless hooks may be used, throughout the Jan. 1–Oct. 31 open season on this reach.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used, USGS gauging station to Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD crossing.
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Combined limit of hatchery trout and/or hatchery steelhead (fish showing a healed adipose fin clip); 2 fish daily, 4 fish in possession.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession, USGS gauging station to Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD crossing.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Take and possession of Chinook Salmon is prohibited on this reach.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon, USGS gauging station to Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD crossing.
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

regulations.humanSummary: Open January 1 through July 15 and July 16 through December 31, Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD crossing to Jibboom Street bridge.
regulations.verbatimText: Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. ... Jul. 16 through Dec. 31.

parameters.counting_rule: Combined limit of hatchery trout and/or hatchery steelhead (fish showing a healed adipose fin clip); 2 fish daily, 4 fish in possession.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession, Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD crossing to Jibboom Street bridge.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Take and possession of Chinook Salmon is prohibited on this reach.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon, Ancil Hoffman Park SMUD crossing to Jibboom Street bridge.
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

regulations.humanSummary: Open January 1 through July 15, July 16 through December 16, and December 17 through December 31, Jibboom Street bridge to the mouth.
regulations.verbatimText: Jan. 1 through Jul. 15. ... Jul. 16 through Dec. 16. ... Dec. 17 through Dec. 31.

parameters.counting_rule: Combined limit of hatchery trout and/or hatchery steelhead (fish showing a healed adipose fin clip); 2 fish daily, 4 fish in possession, across all three season windows.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession, Jibboom Street bridge to the mouth.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Take and possession of Chinook Salmon is prohibited on this reach from July 16 through December 16; not stated as closed during Jan. 1–Jul. 15 or Dec. 17–Dec. 31.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon, July 16 through December 16, Jibboom Street bridge to the mouth.
regulations.verbatimText: Jul. 16 through Dec. 16. ... Closed to the take and possession of Chinook Salmon.

parameters.condition: Trout or steelhead lacking a healed adipose fin clip (i.e. wild/unmarked fish)
parameters.note: Only hatchery-marked fish (healed adipose fin clip) may be retained; all other trout and steelhead must be released immediately unharmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Only adipose-fin-clipped hatchery trout/steelhead may be kept; unmarked wild fish must be released immediately.
regulations.verbatimText: Hatchery trout or steelhead in anadromous waters are those showing a healed adipose fin clip (adipose fin is absent). Unless otherwise provided, all other trout and steelhead must be immediately released.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
